identity.name: PlacementPro
identity.theme_strategy: Hybrid (Light Mode Default with High-Contrast Dark Accents)

usage_rules.cta_primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 (Solid Black for Premium Feel)
usage_rules.score_circle: Use a gradient from Royal Blue to Electric Violet for the score ring

gradients.hero_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900 via-blue-700 to-violet-600

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on the dashboard background to reduce digital flatness (opacity 0.03)

marketing.bento_grid: Use 'Tetris' mode: Mix col-span-4, col-span-6, and col-span-8 for feature blocks.

dashboard.sidebar: w-64 fixed h-screen border-r border-slate-200 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-xl z-30 hidden md:block
dashboard.card_style: bg-white border border-slate-200/60 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-6

buttons.marketing: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95

cards.feature: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-8 hover:border-blue-500/30 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl
cards.stat: flex flex-col justify-between p-6 bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl shadow-sm

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 text-base focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 transition-all

hero_student.alt: Indian female student using laptop confidently
hero_student.usage: Hero section main image or split screen right side

workspace_bg.usage: Background for 'Placement Readiness' section with overlay

abstract_shape.usage: Decorative element near the 'AI Analysis' feature block

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'Brain', 'Sparkles', 'Target', 'TrendingUp' for key features.

instructions_to_main_agent.theme_setup: Update /app/frontend/src/index.css with the HSL values provided in colors.palette. Add the font imports to the top of index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.component_overrides: Customize Shadcn components in /app/frontend/src/components/ui to match the 'radius' and 'border' styles defined here. Remove default 'rounded-md' if it conflicts with 'rounded-xl'.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_rules: For the Dashboard, strictly follow the 'Swiss Grid' layout. Do not center everything. Use left alignment for data. Use the 'sidebar' and 'main_content' classes for structure.
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility: Ensure all text on colored backgrounds meets APCA contrast standards. Use 'text-white' on 'primary' backgrounds. Add 'aria-label' to all icon-only buttons.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards) using kebab-case (e.g., 'resume-upload-btn').
instructions_to_main_agent.forbidden: DO NOT use Teal (#1B93A4) or generic Purple for main CTAs. DO NOT use 'Inter' font for headings (Use Outfit). DO NOT use gradients for full backgrounds (use them for text or subtle accents only).

universal_guidelines.animation: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and staggered list entrances. Add 'hover:scale-[1.02]' to clickable cards.
universal_guidelines.glassmorphism: Use 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-white/20' for sticky headers and floating modals.
universal_guidelines.spacing: Use 'gap-6' or 'gap-8' for grids. Avoid tight packing. Give content room to breathe.
